name: PT Jaya Real Property, Tbk.
summary: PT Jaya Real Property, Tbk., together with its subsidiaries, develops residential areas and manages commercial properties in Indonesia. It operates through Sale of Land and Buildings, and Rental and Other Services segments. The Sale of Land and Buildings segment engages in the real estate and urban development activities; and release/purchase, processing, maturation, and development of facilities and infrastructure. The Rental and Other Services segment is involved in leasing of shopping centers and areas of the city, and the water management business. It also provides general trading and construction, building management, and transportation services, as well as operates hotels. The company was founded in 1979 and is based in Tangerang, Indonesia. PT Jaya Real Property, Tbk. is a subsidiary of PT Pembangunan Jaya.
